title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow that chains Claude Opus and Gemini 3.5 Flash for frontend development, with Opus handling planning and copy while Gemini handles UI design. The Archon orchestration framework enables this multi-provider coordination for rapid, visually polished application builds.
